texto: This, it occurred to me, was the deeper meaning in the mournful merriment I had been part of that day. I stood at Mam's sink before bedtime, filling an iced tea glass with water, thinking that I had underestimated this place where I was born. I knew it was a good place to be from. I had no idea how great a place it was to be.
explicacao: Citação de Rod Dreher sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “This, it occurred to me, was the deeper meaning in the mournful merriment I had been part of that…” articula reflexao, family-love, home em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como home.

texto: Here's how to get started with the antipolitical politics of the Benedict Option. Secede culturally from the mainstream. Turn off the television. Put the smartphones away. Read books. Play games. Make music. Feast with your neighbors. It is not enough to avoid what is bad; you must also embrace what is good. Start a church, or a group within your church. Open a classical Christian school, or join and strengthen one that exists. Plant a garden, and participate in a local farmer's market. Teach kids how to play music, and start a band. Join the volunteer fire department.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rod Dreher sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Here's how to get started with the antipolitical politics of the Benedict Option. Secede cultural…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, benedict-option, politics, útil em momentos de politics.

texto: Sex and commerce are fine things, but man cannot live by Viagra and the Dow Jones alone. A life led collecting things and experiences in pursuit of happiness is not necessarily a bad life, but it’s not a good life either. Too often, the Democrats act like the Party of Lust, and the Republicans the Party of Greed. Both are deadly sins that eat at the soul.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rod Dreher: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Sex and commerce are fine things, but man cannot live by Viagra and the Dow Jones alone. A life l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, democrats, dow-jones pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dow-jones e greed.
